Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Rapper Snoop Dogg to carry Paris Olympics 2024 torch

American rapper Snoop Dogg will carry the Olympic flame through Saint-Denis on Friday ahead of the Paris Olympics 2024 opening ceremony.

American rapperSnoop Doggwillcarry the Olympic flamethrough Saint-Denis on Friday, marking a significant moment before theParis Olympics 2024opening ceremony.

Joining him will be French actressLaetitia Casta, French rapperMC Solaar, and retired Ukrainian pole-vaulterSergey Bubka.

Snoop Dogg will carry it through the streets of Saint-Denis, the ethnically diverse northern Paris suburb that is home to the Olympic Stadium and Aquatics Centre, the town’s mayor Mathieu Hanotin told AFP on Monday.

The Olympic flame has spent two months crossing France, and Friday morning it will be carried through the athletes’ village which straddles Saint-Denis and neighbouring Saint-Ouen, before going to the Olympic Stadium and the Aquatics Centre a few kilometres away.

Snoop Dogg, 52, was born in greater Los Angeles, which will host the next Games in 2028.

The torch relay will not be the rapper’s only appearance at the Paris Olympics 2024 as he will also be an Olympic commentator for US television station NBC.

title: Rapper Snoop Dogg to carry Paris Olympics 2024 torch
author: Garrin Lambley
description: American rapper Snoop Dogg will carry the Olympic flame through Saint-Denis on Friday ahead of the Paris Olympics 2024 opening ceremony.
